ideas.title: The Liquid Diamond Storms of Jupiter (Auto-Scheduled)
ideas.hook: It actually rains diamonds on Jupiter but you'll never guess how big they really get.

scripts.title: Why You Are Sleeping Wrong (An Honest Sleep Routine Blueprint)

scenes.visualPrompt: Close up photo of a blue glowing smartphone display illuminating a dark aesthetic bedroom. Shallow depth of field, photorealistic, cinematic lighting.
scenes.dialogue: Look at that phone. That blue light isn't just bright - it's lying to your brain.
scenes.voiceoverText: Look at that phone screen. That blue light isn't just bright - it's lying to your brain that it is high noon.

scenes.visualPrompt: Isometric 3D render of a healthy sleep environment, calming green houseplants, humid cooler machine, amber lighting, cosy bedroom aesthetics.
scenes.dialogue: Your brain thinks it's high noon, completely killing your melatonin production. If you want deep sleep, switch to warm amber lights by ten and hide your screen.
scenes.voiceoverText: This kills your melatonin production instantly. To fix it, swap to warm amber lights by ten and lock your screen away.

scenes.visualPrompt: Cinematic flat-lay shot of a glass of chamomile tea next to an old-school alarm clock showing 10:30 PM, soft focus, high-contrast cozy dark shadows.
scenes.dialogue: Give it try tonight. Your mornings will feel infinitely better. Subscribe for more tiny habits.
scenes.voiceoverText: Make this one tweak and watch how fast you spring out of bed tomorrow. Subscribe for more high-yield daily routines.

scripts.title: 3 Shocking Space Facts They Didn't Teach You in School

scenes.visualPrompt: Bespoke cosmic space rendering with beautiful nebula clouds, glowing yellow stars, and a giant sparkling diamond crystal planet reflecting ambient space light.
scenes.dialogue: Fifty light-years away, there is a star named Lucy. And yes, her core is literally a ten-billion-trillion-trillion-carat diamond.
scenes.voiceoverText: Fifty light-years away, there is a star named Lucy. And yes, her core is literally a ten-billion-trillion-trillion-carat diamond.

scenes.visualPrompt: A giant ringed planet composed entirely of beautiful golden liquid hot metallic gas, floating in deep dark velvet cosmos with nearby binary system.
scenes.dialogue: Next, it actually rains liquid diamonds on Saturn and Jupiter due to extreme atmospheric pressures. Imagine getting caught in THAT storm.
scenes.voiceoverText: Next, it actually rains solid diamonds on Saturn and Jupiter due to extreme atmospheric pressures. Imagine getting caught in THAT thunderstorm.

scenes.visualPrompt: Futuristic astronaut suit looking back at a vibrant blue glowing planet earth from a distance, starry cosmic backdrop, dramatic, reflective visor, high detailed.
scenes.dialogue: Finally, space is completely silent. Sound waves need atmosphere to travel, leaving you alone in perfect quiet. Follow for curious facts every morning!
scenes.voiceoverText: Finally, outer space is completely silent. Sound waves need atmosphere to travel, leaving you in perfect, absolute quiet. Hit mock follow to discover space mysteries daily!

scripts.title: The Liquid Diamond Storms of Jupiter (Auto-Scheduled)

scenes.visualPrompt: Stunning atmospheric visual rendering of a deep planet surface under heavy cloud layers, glowing diamond particles falling, volumetric cinematic lights, portrait aspect.
scenes.dialogue: It actually rains diamonds on Jupiter but you'll never guess how big they really get. Let's explore exactly what happens behind the gas clouds.
scenes.voiceoverText: It actually rains diamonds on Jupiter but you'll never guess how big they really get. Let’s break down exactly what happens deep inside the storm.

scenes.visualPrompt: Extreme pressure chamber diagram showing carbon structural atoms crystallizing under extreme planetary pressure, sparkling graphics, science style rendering, realistic.
scenes.dialogue: Under extreme atmospheric gravity, airborne carbon is squished first into soot, turning literally into solid diamonds as they float downward.
scenes.voiceoverText: Under millions of bars of pressure, airborne carbon soot crystallizes, transforming directly into hard, shimmering diamonds that float to the core.

scenes.visualPrompt: A futuristic glass bubble outpost hovering over methane sea representing human space exploration, beautiful orange skies, modern luxury clean aesthetic.
scenes.dialogue: Follow CosmoFacts for daily morning space discoveries and habit upgrades right on your phone screen.
scenes.voiceoverText: Double tap and subscribe to CosmoFacts to unpack the deepest space secrets automatically every single morning.
